_format.note: Voice-style placeholder prose for the dossier and battle log. Inline markup: ~~strike~~ for double-strike, [[N]] for an N-char redaction bar, **gold** for the gold accent (sparing, on charged words), !!text!! for blood-red text (rare, on the words the document writes anyway). All prose is lowercase.
_format.lookup: Dossier reads: subtitles[species] || subtitles[type]; notes[species] || notes[type]. Battle log reads: actions[abilityKey].use || actionDefaults[element].use; same for hit/flavor. effectDefaults[kind] is consulted when an ability has no damage. afflictions[statusKey].apply / .tick are read on apply / per-turn-tick.
_format.templates: {actor} = lowercased name of the doer. {target} = lowercased name of the receiver. {name} = ability display name (lowercased). {status} = lowercased affliction name.

subtitles.fire: something is wrong with its heat.
subtitles.water: it is dry to the touch. it should not be.
subtitles.grass: it has been waiting longer than i have.
subtitles.light: it does not warm what it lights.
subtitles.Emberkin: i have been carrying it. i did not know.
subtitles.Cinderling: no fuel observed. the heat continues.
subtitles.Pyrelord: it has been here longer than anyone i have asked.
subtitles.Magmaw: when it opens i hear another room.
subtitles.Charnel: i do not look at it for long.
subtitles.Rivergeist: subject does not remain at site of filing.
subtitles.Brineback: it has been here too long.
subtitles.Mireling: i found it where i had left no print.
subtitles.Loamback: i mistook it for a stone. then for ~~moss~~ a face.
subtitles.Sproutkin: it is small. it is opening.
subtitles.Mosshorn: it was a stone for a long time.
subtitles.Vinewyrm: it is crossing the room. slowly.
subtitles.Bloomback: it is in flower. the flowers face me.
subtitles.Lumenpup: it does not cast a shadow.
subtitles.Dawnstag: it knows when the dawn was.
subtitles.Halowyrm: the light it carries hurts. i look anyway.
subtitles.Glimmerfox: i never saw it begin to move.
subtitles.Voidling: there is a place where it should be.
subtitles.Umbragale: the wind in this room is wrong.

fire: it ~~burns~~ smolders where i did not light it.
i feel its heat after it has gone.
it does not warm me. it warms what i was.
water: i hear ~~water~~ something running near it.
grass: where i did not plant, it grows.
it is older than the ground it stands on.
light: it is too ~~bright~~ clear to look at directly.
the light it makes is not clean.
i can still see it when i ~~close~~ shut my eyes.
dark: it has been here longer than i thought.
it does not require my eyes to see me.
Emberkin: i found it in my coat. the lining is soaked through and has been for some time.
it ~~hums~~ does not hum, but the floor next to it does.
it knows my **handwriting** now. it has begun to ~~try~~ practice it.
Ashmaw: i feed it the small things. the smaller ones first. it accepts them all.
it watches the page while i write — first the smaller words, then the longer ones, then the spaces between, then my hand, then the place my hand started from.
i think it is **patient** with me. for now.
Cinderling: specimen lit at field site. brought through containment door.
no fuel ~~observed~~ permitted. ~~the spark continues~~ the spark continues.
specimen does not require ~~feeding~~ attention. specimen ~~has not~~ has not.
Pyrelord: this room has always been its room. the assignment paperwork lists me as the most recent ~~tenant~~ visitor.
i asked someone older. they remembered being told about it as a child.
i do not interrupt it. !!no one has!!.
Magmaw: it opens once a day, and then less, and then the same.
what is inside it is not it. what is inside it is ~~bigger~~ farther. we do not measure ~~the room~~ what is in there.
the air from inside smells of [[8]]. last month it smelled of [[12]]. it has been changing.
Soothlick: it cleans the wounds. it cleans the smaller things inside the wounds. it cleans the things i did not know were inside the wounds. it cleans.
i forget the hour after it has gone. i ~~lose~~ misplace ~~them~~ the parts of me it has cleaned.
Charnel: the floor does not blacken under it. that work has already been done.
i do not write what it ~~eats~~ takes. !!do not write it!!.
Tidewhelp: it follows streams that are not in this building.
i drink water and it watches.
i have been drinking the way it drinks. my throat is fine. my throat has been fine for days. my throat has been fine.
Rivergeist: the showers in the next wing run upward now. i hear them at night.
Brineback: the floor under it is white now. the ceiling above it is white now.
the brine does not leave it. the room does not leave it. the hour does not leave it.
i was the second one to be assigned to it. i have not asked about the first.
Mireling: i found it under what i had not lifted. i have stopped lifting things.
the mud where it sleeps does not dry.
i do not know what it is small for. someone else might.
Coralhusk: phase two: what remains has edges. they ~~are~~ remember.
i used my hand the once. the hand has [[5]]. !!file separately!!.
Frostfin: i do not remember catching it. i do not remember catching it.
the room is colder where it sits. the room is colder where it has sat. the room is colder.
i think it has been the same one. all of them. every time.
Deepmaw: when i look at it, i look at something further down.
i do not measure it. the report says i did. i do not remember measuring it.
it has been **waiting**. i have begun to ~~wait~~ keep watch with it.
Loamback: it grows ~~quietly~~ patiently even when held.
the ground misses it when it leaves. i have started to miss it when it leaves.
when i set it down, the floor under it is darker. it looks back up at me.
Sproutkin: it is opening. that is what it is doing. it has been doing it for ~~weeks~~ the duration of my assignment.
i do not know what is inside. the file does not say.
i should ~~stop~~ keep watching. the **instructions** are ~~clear~~ unsigned.
Mosshorn: the place it sat is colder than the rest of the floor.
i hear it shifting at night. once a night. always at the same hour.
no one has measured how long it was a stone for. no one wants to.
Vinewyrm: i write while it moves. the page ~~tightens~~ holds.
i was at the door yesterday. i am at the wall today. i did not move.
it knows where my chair is. i think it has known for a long time.
Bloomback: the flowers do not turn with the light. they turn with my chair.
i ~~picked~~ took one. the rest noticed. the rest have not stopped noticing.
the smell is **sweet**. that is the worst part. it followed me on my coat.
Thornling: it does not mean to. i think.
i can feel where it touched, three days later. four. !!still!!.
Hollowoak: i can hear something inside it. there is nothing inside it. both of these are written into the file, on the same line, in the same hand.
it has been here longer than the others. all of the others. its file is older than the building's, technically.
it does not move. that is its **work**.
Lumenpup: it makes shadows on me. it does not cast its own.
it is warm. it should be warmer. i should be warmer.
i cannot picture it when i ~~close my eyes~~ try to. i can hear it though.
Aurabeast: the room is brighter where it has stood. the page is brighter too.
it does not eat. it has been here [[10]]. it does not need to.
i think it has been **writing me down**. i ~~stopped~~ have stopped finding sentences i remember writing.
Dawnstag: it arrived at first light on a thursday. there has not been another thursday since.
i cannot tell if its antlers are growing. each time i look they are different.
it does not sleep. it does not need to. it does not remember why it might.
Halowyrm: it is longer than the room. i have ~~measured~~ counted. counting has been going wrong.
looking at it hurts. i look anyway. !!so does the file!!.
when it speaks i do not ~~hear~~ remember it. i write things down i do not understand.
Glimmerfox: it is faster than i am. it was faster than the previous handler.
i am not certain it was ever here. the file is.
i write its name and i think of someone ~~else~~ who is not. i ~~try~~ keep trying to remember her.
Shadowmaw: it stays low to the floor. it has been there for as long as the floor has been there.
it has been listening for a long time. for the right name.
i think it is waiting for me to ~~speak~~ say it. i ~~have~~ have not. !!no!!.
Voidling: i can see what is behind it. it is not behind it.
it does not occupy a volume. the volume is occupied around it.
i mark its **name** on the page so i remember it remains. the ink runs.
Nightcreep: it is closer than it was.
i did not see it move. nothing did.
i should ~~not~~ keep writing this down. i ~~am~~ have to.
Wraithfin: it ~~is~~ has been here a moment longer than i have looked. it is here when i look back.
i can see through it. behind it: the hallway, the door, ~~someone i recognize~~ no one.
it does not breathe. it does not need to. ~~i~~ neither do i, lately.
Umbragale: the wind in this room has been wrong since it arrived.
i can hear another room when it is near. it is not a room in this building. !!i think i know which one!!.
the page lifts when ~~i~~ it has not. always toward the same corner.

passives.brutal: it does not measure how hard.
passives.thick_hide: it arrives heavier than it left.
passives.tide_guard: the water answers when it asks.
passives.iron_grip: once it has hold of a thing.
passives.tide_blessed: the salt does not leave it.
passives.verdant_soul: green does not heal it. it heals green.
passives.sunforged: hammered out of a brighter place.
passives.shadowforged: hammered out of where light is not.
passives.tempo: keeps a meter i cannot follow.
passives.lightbearer: walks ahead of its own glow.
passives.soul_drain: takes a small piece each strike.
passives.vampire_touch: every hit is a small drink.
passives.second_wind: stands once after it has fallen.
passives.warm_blood: resists the cold that comes after.
passives.iron_will: does not bend where others would.
passives.hex_eater: swallows what is laid upon it.
passives.frostbite: cold spreads from where it touches.
passives.patient_hunter: waits longer than it needs to.
passives.echo_form: repeats the last sound i made.
passives.dreadful: i do not want to look at it.
passives.lucky: the dice do not catch it.
passives.savage: does not stop at the kill.

events.swap_in: {actor} steps forward to take its place.
events.swap_none: {actor} ~~tries~~ has no one to swap to.
events.swap_curse: the name takes from {actor} on the way out.
